changes: Screen capture now starts within seconds of launch instead of staying paused for 30-60 seconds
Fixed the macOS app repeatedly requesting Screen Recording permission on launch when it has not been granted
Improved desktop credential protection by storing production sign-in tokens and local agent tokens in Keychain and requiring authentication for local automation controls
Made opening settings from the floating bar and focusing the follow-up input more reliable
Fixed chat sign-in recovery so expired desktop sessions refresh or reopen the real Google sign-in flow instead of only visiting the Omi home page.
